'''TC-9D0''' was a brown-hued [[TC-series protocol droid/Legends|TC-series protocol droid]] wanted by the special branch of the [[Senate Guard/Legends|Senatorial Guard]] for abandoning his post while in possession of "sensitive information" concerning the corrupt dealings of [[Twi'lek/Legends|Twi'lek]] [[Senator/Legends|Senator]] [[Connus Trell]].

In [[32 BBY/Legends|32 BBY]], the [[Bounty hunter/Legends|bounty hunter]] [[Jango Fett/Legends|Jango Fett]] captured TC-9D0 and claimed his bounty on the streets of [[Merchant Row (Outland Station)|Merchant Row]] while hunting [[Meeko Ghintee]].

==Behind the scenes==
In the [[Star Wars video games|video game]] ''[[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter]]'', TC-9D0 is the first of ten possible secondary bounties which the player can secure in the [[Star Wars: Bounty Hunter#Merchant Row|Merchant Row]] section during Chapter One. Players have the option of capturing TC-9D0 or destroying him. If the [[Droid/Legends|droid]] is recovered in good condition, his bounty is valued at 2,500 [[Galactic Credit Standard/Legends|credits]]. If he were destroyed, however, then the job would only earn the player 1,250 credits. He is also the only droid among all of the game's secondary bounties.
